allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Refactor captions component with lyrics-style display

- Extract template to separate captions.component.html
- Add lyrics-style caption display with all captions visible
- Implement auto-scroll to center current caption
- Add word context/AI translation with pronunciation and examples
- Add navigation methods \(previous/replay/next cue\)
- Auto-pause video on word click, resume on close
- Support auto_pause_after_caption setting
- Improve settings handling with async loading

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add comprehensive features for enhanced learning experience

Content Script:
- Implement ALL_CAPTIONS and CUE_INDEX_CHANGE message types
- Add fuzzy subtitle matching with multiple strategies \(exact, index-based, fuzzy\)
- Support video control messages \(pause, play, seek\)
- Improve translated caption matching with tolerance

Service Worker:
- Add AI word context via Google Gemini API integration
- Implement video control message forwarding to content script
- Add GET_WORD_CONTEXT handler with fallback to basic translation
- Add auto_pause_after_caption to default settings
- Store and retrieve Gemini API key from chrome.storage

Messaging Service:
- Add getWordContext\(\) for AI-powered word definitions
- Add pauseVideo\(\), playVideo\(\), seekToTime\(\) methods
- Add WordContextResponse interface with pronunciation, examples, part of speech

Settings Service:
- Refactor to use async initialization pattern
- Add waitForReady\(\) method for proper async loading
- Add isReady\(\) and getLanguageNames\(\) utilities
- Improve error handling and logging

Settings Component:
- Add Gemini API key configuration field
- Improve language names display
- Better form handling and validation

Header Component:
- Simplify by removing embedded settings form
- Clean up component structure

Messages Types:
- Add VIDEO_CONTROL, SEEK_TO_CUE, GET_WORD_CONTEXT types
- Add ALL_CAPTIONS, CUE_INDEX_CHANGE for lyrics display
- Add comprehensive payload types for all message types

Video Sync:
- Update onCueChange to include cueIndex parameter
- Support for cue index tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
